Energy Solutions

Harness the Power of the Sun and cut down your electricity bills
while embracing a cleaner,greener Bangladesh. At Solar Home BD, we
specialize in delivering top-tier solar panel installations, inverters and
renewable energy solution for homes, bussinesses and industries.

Our Services

Whether you're looking to reduce electricity bills, achive energy
independence or embrace a sustainable future, our expert team
provides end-to-end solar solutions with high-quality equipment,
seamless installation and long-team support.

portfolio

Our Projects

We take pride in delivering high-performance solar projects that drive sustainable energy adoption across residential, commercial and industrial sectors in Bangladesh. From 55 MW rooftop solar installations for factories to off-frid and hybrid solar systems powering rural communities, our projects are designed to maximize energy efficiency and reduce carbon footprints
